MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-18-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-18-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE CHERNEV DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE." (CCP 435.5(A).) THE PARTIES ARE IMMEDIATELY ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 10, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-13-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The Chernev declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person or by telephone." (CCP 435.5(a).) The parties are immediately ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by June 10, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
